title: Batch Test Plating
author: [Innovative Solutions - Argenitna]
description: This is a flexible protocol that helps you to prepare the PCR plate for a batch test of 12 samples and 2 No Template Controls, with the previous adition of the Master Mix The protocol is broken down into 3 main parts: * Mix dispensing * Samples Dispensing * NTC dispensing ---
steps_raw: This is a flexible protocol that helps you to prepare the PCR plate for a batch test of 12 samples and 2 No Template Controls, with the previous adition of the Master Mix The protocol is broken down into 3 main parts: * Mix dispensing * Samples Dispensing * NTC dispensing ---
Master Mix dispensing from Temperature Module to pcr plate
Samples dispensing from Tuberack to pcr plate
NTC dispensing from Tuberack to pcr plate
